title: Information Product
description: Product formed by selecting, acquiring, evaluating, analyzing, synthesizing, assessing, restructuring, aggregating, translating, packaging, or repackaging data and information from various sources.

definitions.definition: Product formed by selecting, acquiring, evaluating, analyzing, synthesizing, assessing, restructuring, aggregating, translating, packaging, or repackaging data and information from various sources.
definitions.sources: - NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
